use_cases: Hero section titles with animated highlight effect
Call-to-action text emphasis with directional reveal
Marketing landing page text reveals on scroll
Feature highlights with spring-based motion effects
ai_summary: A motion-powered highlighted text component that reveals text content with a sweeping animated background bar using CSS mix-blend-difference for high contrast. Supports directional animations from left, right, top, or bottom edges with spring physics for natural motion. Perfect for creating engaging hero text, CTAs, and section headers with scroll-triggered reveal effects.
